title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
BOK hikes +25bp to 2.75% — first since 2023, signals more; inflation 3.2%.
Morgan Stanley E*Trade crypto live: BTC/ETH/SOL to 8.6M accounts at 50bp fee.
Jobless Claims (Jul 11 wk) 208k vs 217k est — beat; labor market stable.
BTC ~$65,000 (flat 24h). Retail Sales Jun +0.2% vs +0.3% est (noted prev. run).
